narrative:
Truro-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 106 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.9 percentage points.
